narrative:
Oakwood-05-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 423 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 47.0%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 41.4 percentage points.
